mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) AS id, id AS chunkId, content, ts_rank(to_tsvector('simple', content), to_tsquery('simple', #{tsQuery})) AS score FROM sai_rag_chunk WHERE rag_id = #{ragId} AND content IS NOT NULL AND to_tsvector('simple', content) @@ to_tsquery('simple', #{tsQuery}) ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
